userOutcome: Phase truth is always consistent with work order status. No manual phase-set needed.
scopeSummary: Wire set_feature_phase() into sync_work_order() using _phase_from_status(). Add patrol phase consistency check. Migrate /review and /ship to read work order status first. Deprecate manual phase-set.
risks: Backward phase transition warnings during auto-sync on work order regression
Phase-gated commands may need updated to read work order status
readinessReason: All dependencies met. Scope clear. No blocking open questions.
handoffSummary: Wire set_feature_phase() into sync_work_order() via _phase_from_status(). Add patrol check for phase/status divergence. Update /review and /ship to read work order status as primary, phase as fallback. Mark manual phase-set as deprecated.
